package rulecoverage

func PositiveSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModels() string {
    ruleID := "swagger_or_openapi_annotations_on_persistence_models"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Persistence structs used as the public docs contract instead of transport DTOs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
